stdout:
**Findings**

No blocking findings.

**Acceptance Criteria**

Met. `pass_all_gates` iterates `gates_required` in order and short-circuits on the first error via `try_fold` in [gate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/gate.rs:485). It delegates each gate to `pass_gate`, so the skip-if-passed-at-HEAD behavior is inherited at [gate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/gate.rs:488).

**Architecture**

Boundaries are respected. Command logic lives in [gate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/gate.rs:473), CLI dispatch/output lives in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:1918), and argument shape is in [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:829). No new domain/storage boundary violations found.

**Functional Paradigm**

Acceptable. The implementation uses `try_fold` for fail-fast accumulation rather than an imperative loop in command logic.

**Correctness And Invariants**

State changes continue to flow through existing `pass_gate`, `check_gate`, and storage paths. Manual gate passes append existing `gate_passed` events through `pass_gate`; automated gate execution follows the existing gate-run/status path. No new file write path or PID handling was introduced.

**Safety**

`#![deny(unsafe_code)]` remains enforced in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:14). No unsafe code found in the reviewed changes.

**Testing**

The new integration coverage exercises all relevant CLI behavior: all pass, fail-fast checker failure, runner error, HEAD-skip inheritance, no required gates, and missing issue in [gate_pass_all_test.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/gate_pass_all_test.rs:91). Provided cargo-ci evidence passed: [result.json](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.jit/gate-runs/323f8241-2bac-4c54-9d2c-b048f3f8296e/result.json:14) reports fmt ok, clippy ok, and `2200 passed, 0 failed, 12 ignored`. I did not rerun cargo tests.

**Error Handling**

The shared JSON/non-JSON gate pass error renderer preserves taxonomy: gate failures map to exit 4, runner errors to exit 10, gate-not-required to exit 2, and not-found to exit 3 in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:120). Error context includes issue and gate keys where applicable.

**CLI Contract**

Met. `gate pass-all` has a `--json` flag in [cli.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/cli.rs:841), and JSON success output includes `issue_id`, `status`, `verdict`, and per-gate entries in [main.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/main.rs:1934).

**Documentation**

Public added APIs include doc comments and examples: `GatePassAllEntry`, `PassAllOutcome`, and `pass_all_gates` in [gate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/gate.rs:100). CLI docs were updated in [cli-commands.md](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/docs/reference/cli-commands.md:1326).

**Prior Review Feedback**

`run_history` is empty, so there was no prior feedback to verify.

**Jit Issue Management**

The prerequisite issue `9bfcc474` is marked `done` in [.jit/issues/9bfcc474-d09b-4b0f-9c02-684f3d056cd3.json](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.jit/issues/9bfcc474-d09b-4b0f-9c02-684f3d056cd3.json:5). `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed locally with `Repository validation passed`.
